channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Empire State Building climbers expected to appear in court on Thursday
item.description: The two climbers, Angela Nikolau and Ivan Kuznetsov, now face multiple charges, according to police.

item.title: How dialects reveal America's history and hint at what's next
item.description: Across the United States, the way you speak is filled with cultural authenticity and central to identity.

item.title: Boy driving truck crashes into group of monks, killing 8 and injuring 14
item.description: Police said the boy had taken his parents' pickup truck without permission before losing control of the vehicle and crashing into the monks.

item.title: U.S. designates "Chone Killers" gang a terrorist organization
item.description: The gang "has committed numerous attacks targeting civilians, law enforcement officers, and government officials," Secretary of State Marco Rubio said...
